name: Golden Jewelry & Loan Pawn Shop 골든 전당포
description_short: Golden Jewelry & Loan Pawn Shop is a pawn shop in Los Angeles specializing in jewelry and collateral-based loans with bilingual Korean-English service.
description_long:
Golden Jewelry & Loan Pawn Shop 골든 전당포 operates as a pawn shop located on West Pico Boulevard in Los Angeles, California, serving the local community with collateral-based lending services. The business name reflects its bilingual identity, catering to both English and Korean-speaking customers in the area.

The shop offers pawn shop services typical of the industry, accepting jewelry and other collateral items in exchange for short-term loans. Customers can leverage personal valuables to obtain quick cash without undergoing traditional credit checks or income verification processes. The business is positioned as an alternative to conventional lending for consumers who need immediate liquidity.

The shop distinguishes itself through its specialized focus on jewelry and its bilingual service model, allowing it to serve Korean and English-speaking populations in the Los Angeles area. Operating from a fixed location on West Pico Boulevard with consistent business hours, it provides accessible in-person service to the community.

Based on available public data, the company maintains a 3.4-star rating from 9 Google reviews, suggesting moderate customer satisfaction. The limited review volume prevents deeper analysis of service quality or customer experience patterns. Like all pawn shops, the business model inherently involves higher interest rates and strict repayment terms compared to traditional lending, which is typical but should be understood by customers.
address: 2824 W Pico Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90006

pros: Bilingual Korean-English service accommodates diverse Los Angeles community
Specialized focus on jewelry valuation and purchases
No credit check requirement for collateral-based loans
Quick cash access without income verification or extensive application process
Physical storefront location provides in-person service and item inspection
Consistent business hours (9AM-6PM daily) for customer accessibility
Established business with online presence on FindAPawnShop.com directory
cons: 3.4-star rating from only 9 reviews suggests inconsistent or moderate customer satisfaction
Pawn shop model involves high interest rates and strict loan terms typical of the industry
Risk of losing collateral if loan repayment terms are not met
Limited information available online about specific loan terms, rates, or maximum loan amounts
Pawn shop loans are short-term solutions, not sustainable long-term credit building
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash and willing to use jewelry or valuables as collateral
Korean-speaking Los Angeles residents seeking bilingual pawn shop services
Individuals without traditional credit access who have valuable items to pledge
People seeking quick, no-credit-check loans for emergency expenses
diagnosis: Golden Jewelry & Loan is best for Los Angeles customers who own jewelry or valuables and need immediate cash without credit qualification, particularly Korean-speaking community members. The main caveat is that pawn loans carry high interest rates and risk losing pledged items if repayment obligations aren't met—this is a short-term emergency solution, not a sustainable credit strategy.
services: Pawn loans secured by jewelry collateral
Bilingual customer service in Korean and English
